note: Manifest-driven audio overrides for the procedural soundtrack (src/ui/audio/audioRegistry.ts). Add files to items[] to layer recorded stems over the WebAudio engine; absent/empty items = pure procedural. Default file for a slot is <slot>.ogg. Music stems crossfade by tension (the recording owns the calm mix); they are bound to one AudioContext, so music and ambience load on their own engines. Generated by the AI asset pipeline (needs HF_TOKEN + an encoder) or dropped in by hand.
